metadata.description: Evidence-based multi-engine OCR for Apple Silicon — MCP server with measured auto-routing + workflow skills

plugins.name: bestocr
plugins.description: bestOCR for agents: bundles the bestocr-mcp MCP server (evidence-based multi-engine OCR over stdio — ocr with auto routing + fallback chain, recommend/list_engines/list_models plus async job polling, notarized binary auto-downloaded on install) and workflow skills — ocr (any PDF/image → Markdown, auto-routed), compare (local vs cloud reference with a named metric), evidence-ingest (the explicit runlog → T2 quality gate). Engines: Apple Vision, tesseract, rapidocr/cnocr/surya adapters, Ollama VLMs (GLM-OCR, OvisOCR2, PaddleOCR-VL), cloud reference (Claude/OpenAI/Gemini — never ranked).
